overall_status: BLOCKED — OVAGEN NAME COLLIDES WITH A VETERINARY FSH PRODUCT; SHORT-PEPTIDE SOURCES CONFLICT OR LACK PRIMARY AUTHENTICATION, AND OV20 SEQUENCE, TERMINI, SALT, QUALITY AND HUMAN EVIDENCE REMAIN OPEN

regulatory_records.current_status: Ovagen is also the name of an ovine FSH veterinary preparation. The supplier peptide asset must remain explicitly separated from that product.
